name: thievul
flavor_texts: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.
With a lithe body and sharp claws, it goes around stealing food and eggs. Boltund is its natural enemy.
text: Thievul is the Fox Pokémon. It is a dark-type Pokémon. Abilities: run-away, unburden, stakeout (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 58, Defense: 58, Sp. Atk: 87, Sp. Def: 92, Speed: 90. Evolution line: nickit → thievul. Lore: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it. With a lithe body and sharp claws, it goes around stealing food and eggs. Boltund is its natural enemy.
